segments.text: When I took office the economy was in ruins. COVID had shut down businesses across the country. Unemployment stood at 6.4 percent. Hundreds of thousands of small businesses closed their doors.
Today we have the strongest economy in the world. We created 15 million new jobs in just three years. That is a record. Unemployment has been below 4 percent for the longest stretch in 50 years.
Inflation has dropped from 9 percent to 3 percent. The lowest in the world. And trending lower. Wages are rising faster than prices. The racial wealth gap is the narrowest it has been in 20 years.
We have seen record small business creation. 16 million new small business applications since I took office. Every single one is a family hoping to build a future. Consumer confidence is surging.
I signed the largest investment in infrastructure in American history. We have already announced over 40,000 projects across the country. Creating hundreds of thousands of good paying jobs.
We are bringing manufacturing back to America. 800,000 new manufacturing jobs and counting. Where is it written that America cannot lead the world in manufacturing again?
The federal deficit. I promised to reduce the federal deficit. And I did. We cut the deficit by over one trillion dollars. The largest deficit reduction in American history. And that is a fact.
Gas prices are down from their peak. The price of insulin for seniors is capped at 35 dollars a month. It used to cost 400 dollars a month. We finally beat big pharma.

I have already cut the national deficit by 1.7 trillion dollars. No president has cut the deficit that much. And I am not done. My budget will reduce the deficit by another 3 trillion over the next decade.
We have the lowest violent crime rate in nearly 50 years. We passed the most significant gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years. Border crossings are down since I signed the executive order.
America has the best economy in the world right now. GDP grew 3.1 percent last year, stronger than any year under the previous administration even before the pandemic hit.
Stock market has hit record highs 40 times since I took office. 401k plans and pensions are stronger. More Americans have health insurance today than ever before in history.
Child poverty was cut in half with the child tax credit. We should restore it. It helped millions of working families put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
We have invested more in America than any president in history. We are seeing the results. Factories are being built, roads and bridges are being fixed, and people are going back to work.
